input.prompt:
I'm adding dark mode to my .NET MAUI Android app. I created ResourceDictionary
themes and used StaticResource to bind colors in my XAML pages. When I
switch themes at runtime nothing changes — the colors stay the same. Also,
when the user toggles dark mode in Android settings my app seems to restart
completely. What am I doing wrong?

input.initialPrompt:
I'm adding dark mode to my .NET MAUI Android app. I created ResourceDictionary
themes and used StaticResource to bind colors in my XAML pages. When I
switch themes at runtime nothing changes — the colors stay the same. Also,
when the user toggles dark mode in Android settings my app seems to restart
completely. What am I doing wrong?

data.content:
Two separate issues here:

**1. `StaticResource` doesn't update at runtime.**
`StaticResource` resolves **once** at XAML load time. Switch to `DynamicResource` so bindings re-evaluate when you swap the merged dictionary:

```xml
<!-- ✗ won't update -->
<Label TextColor="{StaticResource PrimaryTextColor}" />

<!-- ✓ updates on theme change -->
<Label TextColor="{DynamicResource PrimaryTextColor}" />
```

Then swap themes in code like:

```csharp
var mergedDicts = Application.Current.Resources.MergedDictionaries;
mergedDicts.Clear();
mergedDicts.Add(new DarkTheme());   // or LightTheme
```

**2. Android restarts the Activity on UI-mode changes.**
By default Android destroys and recreates the Activity when dark mode toggles. In your `MainActivity.cs`, add `UiMode` to `ConfigurationChanges` so the OS doesn't restart it:

```csharp
[Activity(
    Theme = "@style/Maui.SplashTheme",
    ConfigurationChanges = ConfigChanges.ScreenSize
                         | ConfigChanges.Orientation
                         | ConfigChanges.UiMode       // ← add this
                         | ConfigChanges.ScreenLayout
                         | ConfigChanges.SmallestScreenSize)]
public class MainActivity : MauiAppCompatActivity { }
```

Then, to **react** to the system toggle, override `OnConfigurationChanged`:

```csharp
public override void OnConfigurationChanged(Configuration newConfig)
{
    base.OnConfigurationChanged(newConfig);

    bool isDark = (newConfig.UiMode & UiMode.NightMask) == UiMode.NightYes;
    // swap your ResourceDictionary here
}
```

**TL;DR** — `StaticResource` → `DynamicResource` for runtime updates; add `ConfigChanges.UiMode` to prevent the Activity restart on system theme changes.
data.reasoningText:
The user is asking about two .NET MAUI Android issues related to theming/dark mode:

1. **StaticResource vs DynamicResource**: They're using `StaticResource` to bind colors from ResourceDictionary themes. `StaticResource` is resolved once at load time and never updates. They need `DynamicResource` for runtime theme switching.

2. **App restarting on Android dark mode toggle**: When the Android system dark mode changes, the Activity is recreated by default. In .NET MAUI, you need to handle the `ConfigChanges` flag to prevent the activity from being destroyed and recreated.


Now I'll put together a solution addressing both of these problems.
